title: graellsia longistyla
intro: Graellsia longistyla, also known as the 'Spanish club moss', is a type of lycopod plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Graellsia longistyla can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
